questionHtml: Comment on the magnitudes of random and systematic errors in this experiment using the answers in (e).
markschemeHtml:
Any two:

large percentage error means large systematic error «in procedure» ✔

small percentage uncertainty means small random errors ✔

random errors smaller than systematic error ✔


Award [2] for “both random and systematic errors are significant.”

meta.title: Comment on the magnitudes of random and systematic errors in this experiment using the answers in (e).
